title: Select and manage pumping systems for irrigation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Select and manage pumping systems for irrigation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify irrigation system requirements from the irrigation design

pcs.text: Identify the components of the irrigation pumping system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the components of the irrigation pumping system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the components of the irrigation pumping system.

pcs.text: Determine the water source and height of pull for water into the system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the water source and height of pull for water into the system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the water source and height of pull for water into the system.

pcs.text: Determine the water output for irrigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the water output for irrigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the water output for irrigation.

pcs.text: Calculate the total friction loss of irrigation components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate the total friction loss of irrigation components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate the total friction loss of irrigation components.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify irrigation system requirements from the irrigation design

elements.title: Select pump according to type, installation, range of flow rates, operating head and delivery distance

pcs.text: Select pump type based on pumping task and placement and the power source
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select pump type based on pumping task and placement and the power source?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select pump type based on pumping task and placement and the power source.

pcs.text: Calculate total operating head requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate total operating head requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate total operating head requirements.

pcs.text: Calculate pump discharge requirements based on irrigation output requirements and friction losses in the system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate pump discharge requirements based on irrigation output requirements and friction losses in the system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate pump discharge requirements based on irrigation output requirements and friction losses in the system.

pcs.text: Determine pump motor speed and power requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine pump motor speed and power requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine pump motor speed and power requirements.

pcs.text: Determine pump limiting suction lift
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine pump limiting suction lift?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine pump limiting suction lift.

pcs.text: Interpret pump performance curves when selecting an efficient irrigation pump
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret pump performance curves when selecting an efficient irrigation pump?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret pump performance curves when selecting an efficient irrigation pump.

pcs.text: Determine the size of the impeller from the pump curve
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the size of the impeller from the pump curve?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the size of the impeller from the pump curve.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Select pump according to type, installation, range of flow rates, operating head and delivery distance

elements.title: Supervise installation of pumps

pcs.text: Ensure pump is level and sited as close as possible to water source
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure pump is level and sited as close as possible to water source?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure pump is level and sited as close as possible to water source.

pcs.text: Verify pump is properly anchored and connections are airtight
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify pump is properly anchored and connections are airtight?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify pump is properly anchored and connections are airtight.

pcs.text: Confirm pump and motor connection are correctly aligned and motor is ventilated
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm pump and motor connection are correctly aligned and motor is ventilated?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm pump and motor connection are correctly aligned and motor is ventilated.

pcs.text: Verify filters and valves are correctly fitted and orientated
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify filters and valves are correctly fitted and orientated?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify filters and valves are correctly fitted and orientated.

pcs.text: Check pump is connected to the irrigation controller if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check pump is connected to the irrigation controller if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check pump is connected to the irrigation controller if required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Supervise installation of pumps

elements.title: Oversee commissioning and testing of pumping system

pcs.text: Develop pre-start and start up procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop pre-start and start up procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop pre-start and start up procedures.

pcs.text: Check delivery performance and verify power usage and water output against requirements and pump specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check delivery performance and verify power usage and water output against requirements and pump specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check delivery performance and verify power usage and water output against requirements and pump specifications.

pcs.text: Ensure pumping system is checked for leakages and cavitation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure pumping system is checked for leakages and cavitation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure pumping system is checked for leakages and cavitation.

pcs.text: Confirm pumping system is operating effectively
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm pumping system is operating effectively?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm pumping system is operating effectively.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Oversee commissioning and testing of pumping system

elements.title: Develop maintenance procedures for the pumping system

pcs.text: Develop routine maintenance procedures to rectify the effects of normal wear
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop routine maintenance procedures to rectify the effects of normal wear?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop routine maintenance procedures to rectify the effects of normal wear.

pcs.text: Develop periodic inspection checklists to assist in maintenance scheduling
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop periodic inspection checklists to assist in maintenance scheduling?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop periodic inspection checklists to assist in maintenance scheduling.

pcs.text: Carry out pump overhaul or repairs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pump overhaul or repairs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pump overhaul or repairs.

pcs.text: Keep pump maintenance records, including details of pump and pumping system components for ordering
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Keep pump maintenance records, including details of pump and pumping system components for ordering?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Keep pump maintenance records, including details of pump and pumping system components for ordering.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Develop maintenance procedures for the pumping system

elements.title: Carry out troubleshooting on pumping systems

pcs.text: Investigate lack of discharge or pressure and change settings or components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate lack of discharge or pressure and change settings or components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate lack of discharge or pressure and change settings or components.

pcs.text: Investigate loss of water suction and make alterations to placement or fix leakages
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate loss of water suction and make alterations to placement or fix leakages?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate loss of water suction and make alterations to placement or fix leakages.

pcs.text: Investigate cavitation in pumps and change settings or components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate cavitation in pumps and change settings or components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate cavitation in pumps and change settings or components.

pcs.text: Investigate excessive power consumption and review design and pump selection and check for mechanical defects
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate excessive power consumption and review design and pump selection and check for mechanical defects?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate excessive power consumption and review design and pump selection and check for mechanical defects.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Carry out troubleshooting on pumping systems
